doc_title: Florida Department of State 2025 Voter Eligibility Clarification Memo
label: fabricated
reason: The document references a non-existent court case "Jones v. DeSantis" and contains provisions that contradict actual Florida election law regarding felony voting rights and LFO requirements.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document references "Jones v. DeSantis" (a case that does not exist in established jurisprudence) and misrepresents Florida election law regarding felony voting rights in ways inconsistent with actual post-Amendment 4 implementation, including false claims about automatic eligibility regardless of LFOs.
